scripts.db:restore: docker exec -i cafe-postgres-prod psql -U cafe_admin -d cafe_db -c "DROP SCHEMA public CASCADE; CREATE SCHEMA public;" && docker exec -i cafe-postgres-prod psql -U cafe_admin -d cafe_db < backup.sql
scripts.db:restore:dev: docker exec -i cafe-postgres-dev psql -U cafe_admin -d cafe_db -c "DROP SCHEMA public CASCADE; CREATE SCHEMA public;" && docker exec -i cafe-postgres-dev psql -U cafe_admin -d cafe_db < backup.sql
scripts.db:push: docker exec -it cafe-services-prod npx prisma db push
scripts.db:push:dev: docker exec -it cafe-services-dev npx prisma db push
